prompt: A romantic anime promotional poster. A blonde girl with golden eyes in a white knit sweater rests her head on a sleeping dark-haired boy in a dark hoodie. They snuggle under a plaid blanket in soft, warm lighting. Top left title reads The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten in elegant serif with gold accents, surrounded by 3 floating white feathers and sparkles. Left-aligned text reads A chance encounter brought them together. Kindness brought them closer. and A heartwarming romantic story begins.. A gold bottom-left sticker says "Now Available!". A bottom banner displays A sweet and fluffy love story that will warm your heart..
